summary: Phase 6A RETEST — Team invite endpoint fix VERIFIED. Backend POST /api/v1/team/invitations: 10/10 pytest pass (success, invalid role 'admin'/'foo', malformed email, missing company_id, missing email, duplicate-member 409, duplicate-pending 409, no-token 401, cancel + idempotent re-cancel). Frontend invite flow: 4/4 UI tests pass (success+row+input cleared, cancel removes row, duplicate-member error 'Ce courriel correspond déjà à un membre de cette entreprise', malformed email 'Courriel invalide'). Cleanup verified — 0 leftover pending invitations. Bug from iteration_10 fully resolved.
action_items: Phase 6A complete and green. Ready to move to Phase 6E (Resend email integration for invite_url) or next phase.

Optional (pre-existing, non-blocking): loadProfile race condition on dashboard mount logs 'Failed to fetch' once after Supabase signIn. Already noted iteration_10, did not regress and does not block any flow.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/v1/team/invitations cleanly separates per-company member invites from super-admin onboarding /auth/invite — correct architectural split.
Validations are correct (role whitelist, email regex, duplicate-member 409, duplicate-pending 409). 401 enforced by upstream requireAuth middleware (verified).

Cancel is idempotent at HTTP level (200 on re-cancel) because the update sets status='cancelled' on a row that still exists — good. Note: maybeSingle() returns null only if 0 rows; an already-cancelled row still matches the id filter so .update returns the row → second cancel returns 200 as expected.
invite_url is returned in JSON for debug since Resend not wired yet (Phase 6E). Make sure to remove or guard this in production once email sending lands.
Frontend handleInvite correctly displays backend error via `d.error || HTTP ${r.status}` → preserves localized French messages. settings-feedback testid is present on both success and error states.
seed_data_creation: Created and cancelled ~5 temporary invitations (qa-test-*, qa-dup-*, qa-cancel-*, qa-ui-invite-*) during testing. All cleaned up (verified 0 pending invitations remaining for the company).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6A is now 100% green. Both backend pytest suites can be rerun as regression at any time. For Phase 6E (Resend email), focus on: (a) endpoint still returns invite_url for non-prod environments, (b) email send is non-blocking (don't fail invite creation if Resend is down), (c) /invite/:token consumption flow.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: iteration_10 — TeamTab.handleInvite() pointed at /api/v1/auth/invite (super-admin onboarding) so invites for an existing company always returned 400.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: New backend endpoint POST /api/v1/team/invitations in /app/voicedesk_project/voicedesk/backend/modules/team/index.js (lines 50-118). Frontend Settings.jsx handleInvite (line 356) now POSTs to the new endpoint with {company_id,email,role}.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: 10 backend pytest cases + 4 frontend Playwright scenarios all pass. Cleanup verified — no leftover pending invitations.
